---
title: "Risk of mental health conditions in bereavement"
subtitle: "a population-based analysis of lung cancer spouses"
date: 2025-05-11
author: "Kline DuBose"
image: spousal_bereavement.png
---

This paper examines the risk of mental health conditions among spouses of lung cancer patients using population-based data.

[View paper here](https://doi.org/10.3389/fpubh.2025.1539180)
